items.title: The effectiveness of cardiovascular rehabilitation for transient ischaemic attack and mild stroke: A randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: This RCT (n=140) found that a 6-week cardiovascular rehabilitation program improved 6-minute walk test distance and moderate-to-vigorous physical activity at 6 months post-TIA or mild stroke, compared to usual care.
items.curatedReason: 卒中或短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）后整合心血管康复的益处，在功能能力和身体活动方面，非劣于常规护理且持续 6 个月。这意味着你可以将心血管康复作为这些患者的重要干预手段，改善其长期预后。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中的有效性：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验（n=140）发现，与常规护理相比，为期 6 周的心血管康复计划在 TIA 或轻度卒中后 6 个月显著改善了 6 分钟步行试验距离和中高强度体力活动。
items.curatedReasonEn: Integrated cardiovascular rehabilitation post-TIA or mild stroke demonstrates non-inferiority to usual care in functional exercise capacity and physical activity, sustained over 6 months. This indicates you can confidently incorporate cardiovascular rehabilitation as a key intervention to improve long-term outcomes for these patients.
items.limitation: 研究未详细说明干预的具体组成和强度，可能影响结果的可推广性。
items.limitationEn: The study did not detail the specific components and intensity of the intervention, which may limit generalizability.

items.title: Cross-Education Effect on Force Production Capacity After Unilateral Resistance Training in Clinical Populations: A Systematic Review with Meta-analysis.
items.summary: This systematic review with meta-analysis established the cross-education effect after unilateral resistance training (CE-URT) in clinical populations, including those with musculoskeletal conditions and hemiparesis after stroke, demonstrating force production gains in contralateral non-trained muscles.
items.curatedReason: 单侧阻力训练后的交叉教育效应（CE-URT）在临床人群中已得到系统性证实，可提升对侧未训练肌肉的力量。这支持你在单侧损伤或制动情况下，通过训练健侧来维持或改善患侧功能，为康复提供新的策略。
items.titleZh: 单侧阻力训练后对临床人群力量产生能力的交叉教育效应：一项系统综述和 Meta 分析。
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述和 Meta 分析证实了单侧阻力训练（CE-URT）在临床人群（包括肌肉骨骼疾病和卒中后偏瘫患者）中的交叉教育效应，表明对侧未训练肌肉的力量有所增加。
items.curatedReasonEn: The cross-education effect after unilateral resistance training (CE-URT) is systematically confirmed in clinical populations, enhancing force production in the contralateral untrained limb. This supports training the uninjured side to maintain or improve function in the affected limb during unilateral injury or immobilization, offering a novel strategy in rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 该综述未提供具体效应量数字，也未提及证据分级。
items.limitationEn: The review did not provide specific effect size numbers or mention evidence grading.

items.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation From a U.S. Healthcare Payer Perspective: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities Versus Skilled Nursing Facilities.
items.summary: This decision analytic model evaluated the cost-effectiveness of inpatient rehabilitation facilities (IRFs) versus skilled nursing facilities (SNFs) for stroke survivors in the US, showing IRFs to be more cost-effective from a payer perspective by simulating 90-day outcomes, including mortality and community discharge.
items.curatedReason: 从美国医疗支付方的角度来看，卒中后急性期康复，入住康复医院（IRF）比技能护理机构（SNF）更具成本效益。这为你与支付方沟通，以及为患者选择康复路径提供了有力的证据支持。
items.titleZh: 从美国医疗支付方角度看卒中急性后期康复的成本效益：康复医院与技能护理机构。
items.summaryZh: 这项决策分析模型评估了美国卒中幸存者入住康复医院（IRF）与技能护理机构（SNF）进行急性后期康复的成本效益，通过模拟 90 天结局（包括死亡率和社区出院率），显示 IRF 从支付方角度更具成本效益。
items.curatedReasonEn: From a US healthcare payer perspective, inpatient rehabilitation facilities (IRFs) are more cost-effective than skilled nursing facilities (SNFs) for post-acute stroke rehabilitation. This provides strong evidence to support your discussions with payers and choices for patient rehabilitation pathways.
items.limitation: 本研究采用决策分析模型进行模拟，结果依赖于模型假设和输入数据的准确性。
items.limitationEn: This study used a decision analytic model for simulation, and results depend on the accuracy of model assumptions and input data.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Cost-Effectiveness of Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation From a U.S. Healthcare Payer Perspective: Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities Versus Skilled Nursing Facilities

items.title: The psychosocial impacts of having eating and drinking difficulties after stroke: a qualitative evidence synthesis.
items.summary: A systematic review of 22 studies identified psychological and social impacts as key psychosocial effects of eating and drinking difficulties after stroke, affecting 645 informants.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后吞咽困难的社会心理影响远超生理层面，会严重影响患者情绪和社会参与。你需要将这些非生理因素纳入评估和干预计划，以提供更全面的康复支持。
items.titleZh: 卒中后吞咽困难的社会心理影响：一项定性证据综合。
items.summaryZh: 一项对 22 项研究的系统综述发现，心理和社会影响是卒中后吞咽困难的关键社会心理效应，影响了 645 名信息提供者。
items.curatedReasonEn: The psychosocial impacts of post-stroke eating and drinking difficulties extend beyond physical impairment, significantly affecting emotional well-being and social participation. Incorporate these non-physical factors into your assessment and intervention plans to provide more holistic rehabilitation support.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的方法学质量和综合证据的确定性未在摘要中明确报告。
items.limitationEn: Methodological quality of included studies and certainty of synthesized evidence were not explicitly reported in the abstract.

items.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study (n=333) found that sarcopenia significantly increased the risk of radiographic adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years of anterior cervical discectomy and fusion (ACDF).
items.curatedReason: 颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）后，肌少症会增加 3 年内邻近节段退变的风险。在评估 ACDF 术后患者时，务必考虑肌少症这一风险因素，并加强相关干预。
items.titleZh: 肌少症增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后 3 年内邻近节段退变的风险。
items.summaryZh: 这项回顾性队列研究（n=333）发现，肌少症显著增加了颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后 3 年内影像学邻近节段退变的风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: Sarcopenia increases the risk of adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years following anterior cervical discectomy and fusion (ACDF). When evaluating post-ACDF patients, it is crucial to consider sarcopenia as a risk factor and strengthen related interventions.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，可能存在选择偏倚和数据完整性问题。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective cohort study may be subject to selection bias and data completeness issues.

items.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
items.summary: This pragmatic quasi-experimental study (n=72) found that a 12-week Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure intervention significantly improved physical, psychological, and social outcomes in institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia.
items.curatedReason: 为期 12 周的体感游戏（exergaming）干预能显著改善机构养老老年肌少症患者的身体、心理和社会结局。这提示你可以在长期护理机构中，将体感游戏作为一种低成本、多益处的干预手段，以综合管理肌少症。
items.titleZh: 机构养老老年肌少症患者体感游戏的多领域益处：身体、心理和社会结局。
items.summaryZh: 这项务实准实验研究（n=72）发现，为期 12 周的任天堂 Switch Ring Fit Adventure 体感游戏干预显著改善了机构养老老年肌少症患者的身体、心理和社会结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: A 12-week exergaming intervention significantly improves physical, psychological, and social outcomes in institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia. This suggests you can integrate exergaming into long-term care facilities as a low-cost, multi-benefit intervention for comprehensive sarcopenia management.
items.limitation: 本研究为准实验性设计，非随机化，可能存在选择偏倚和无法完全控制混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This study used a quasi-experimental design, which is non-randomized and may be subject to selection bias and unaddressed confounding factors.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Shortwave diathermy for managing knee osteoarthritis: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis of 17 trials (n=1372) found that shortwave diathermy (SWD) significantly improved pain (mean -2.13; 95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]; p < .01) and walking ability (mean -0.72; 95% CI [-1.02, -0.42]; p < .01) in patients with knee osteoarthritis.
items.curatedReason: 短波透热疗法（SWD）对膝关节骨关节炎（KOA）患者的疼痛和步行能力有临床相关改善。尽管有异质性，但当常规手段效果不佳时，你可以考虑将其作为辅助治疗手段，但需警惕证据确定性中等。
items.titleZh: 短波透热疗法治疗膝骨关节炎：一项系统综述和 Meta 分析。
items.summaryZh: 这项包含 17 项试验（n=1372）的系统综述和 Meta 分析发现，短波透热疗法（SWD）显著改善了膝骨关节炎患者的疼痛（平均值 -2.13；95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]；p < .01）和步行能力（平均值 -0.72；95% CI [-1.02, -0.42]；p < .01）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Shortwave diathermy (SWD) provides clinically relevant improvements in pain and walking ability for knee osteoarthritis (KOA) patients. Despite heterogeneity, you can consider it as an adjunctive treatment when conventional methods are insufficient, but be aware of the moderate certainty of evidence.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的异质性较高，可能影响 Meta 分析结果的普适性。
items.limitationEn: High heterogeneity among included studies may limit the generalizability of the meta-analysis results.

items.title: Physical Activity in Women With Obesity: Fatigue, Knee Symptoms, and Functional Capacity.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity found that functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers were significantly associated with lower physical activity levels.
items.curatedReason: 肥胖女性的膝关节症状、功能受限和活动障碍与体力活动水平呈负相关。在临床评估肥胖女性的体力活动水平时，要综合考虑这些因素，才能制定更精准的干预策略。
items.titleZh: 肥胖女性的体力活动：疲劳、膝关节症状和功能能力。
items.summaryZh: 这项对 85 名肥胖女性进行的横断面研究发现，功能能力、肌肉骨骼症状和感知障碍与较低的体力活动水平显著相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: Knee symptoms, functional limitations, and perceived barriers are negatively associated with physical activity in women with obesity. When assessing physical activity levels in obese women, consider these factors holistically to develop more precise intervention strategies.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Feasibility of applying the Cognitive Orientation to daily Occupational Performance (CO-OP) approach in a Danish municipal neurorehabilitation context.
items.summary: This feasibility study examined the application of Cognitive Orientation to daily Occupational Performance (CO-OP) for home-living stroke survivors in a Danish neurorehabilitation center, reporting on recruitment, dose, fidelity, and perceived value.
items.curatedReason: CO-OP 方法在丹麦社区神经康复环境中对卒中幸存者是可行的。这提示你可以考虑将此方法引入你的神经康复实践，尤其是在认知功能相对完好的居家卒中患者中。
items.titleZh: 认知导向日常职业表现（CO-OP）方法在丹麦市政神经康复环境中应用的初步可行性研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项可行性研究评估了认知导向日常职业表现（CO-OP）方法在丹麦神经康复中心对居家卒中幸存者的应用，报告了招募、剂量、依从性和感知价值等方面。
items.curatedReasonEn: The CO-OP approach is feasible for stroke survivors in a Danish municipal neurorehabilitation setting. This suggests you could consider incorporating this method into your neurorehabilitation practice, particularly for home-dwelling stroke patients with relatively intact cognitive function.
items.limitation: 本研究为单组前瞻性设计，缺乏对照组，无法评估干预的实际效果。
items.limitationEn: This study used a single-group pre-post design, lacking a control group to evaluate the intervention's actual efficacy.

items.title: Blood pressure levels and clinically meaningful changes during inpatient rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: insights from the Dutch Spinal Cord Injury Database.
items.summary: This retrospective cohort study (n=1286) from the Dutch SCI Database identified associations between blood pressure and demographic, injury, and medication characteristics at admission, and examined changes in BP and heart rate during inpatient rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 脊髓损伤（SCI）患者住院康复期间的血压水平与多种特征相关，且 admission-to-discharge 之间会有变化。了解这些关联有助于你更精准地管理 SCI 患者的心血管风险，并优化康复方案。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤住院康复期间的血压水平和临床有意义的变化：来自荷兰脊髓损伤数据库的见解。
items.summaryZh: 这项来自荷兰脊髓损伤数据库的回顾性队列研究（n=1286）识别了入院时血压与人口统计学、损伤和用药特征之间的关联，并检查了住院康复期间血压和心率的变化。
items.curatedReasonEn: Blood pressure levels in individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI) during inpatient rehabilitation are associated with various characteristics and change between admission and discharge. Understanding these associations can help you more accurately manage cardiovascular risks in SCI patients and optimize rehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，可能存在混杂因素和数据完整性偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective cohort study may be subject to confounding factors and data completeness bias.

items.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.
items.summary: This review emphasizes the importance of identifying and treating early-stage symptomatic hip osteoarthritis (OA) as a critical window of opportunity to slow or change its trajectory, especially given its growing prevalence in young adults.
items.curatedReason: 早期有症状髋关节骨关节炎（OA）的识别和干预非常重要，因为这是治疗可能改变疾病进展轨迹的“机会之窗”。你作为 PT 需要提高对该疾病早期阶段的识别能力，并了解其潜在的治疗益处，以优化患者转归。
items.titleZh: 早期有症状髋关节骨关节炎：一个机会之窗。
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述强调了识别和治疗早期有症状髋关节骨关节炎（OA）的重要性，认为这是一个减缓或改变其病程轨迹的关键机会之窗，尤其考虑到该病在年轻人中的患病率不断上升。
items.curatedReasonEn: Identifying and intervening in early-stage symptomatic hip osteoarthritis (OA) is crucial, as it represents a "window of opportunity" where treatment can potentially alter disease trajectory. As a PT, you need to enhance your ability to recognize this early stage and understand the potential treatment benefits to optimize patient outcomes.
items.limitation: 这是一篇述评，不提供新的研究数据或系统性证据。
items.limitationEn: This is a perspective article, not providing new research data or systematic evidence.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Patient Engagement, Clinical Outcomes, and Satisfaction of an Advanced Orthopedic Virtual Physical Therapy Model: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study found that an advanced orthopedic virtual physical therapy model achieved 70.9% completion rates—exceeding national benchmarks (43%)—and 96% of completers achieved Minimal Clinically Important Differences in outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 远程物理治疗在骨科康复中展现了超越传统模式的潜力，特别是其在依从性和功能改善方面的优势。这项研究强调了远程 PT 模型的可行性与高效性，为你将虚拟护理整合到日常实践中提供了强有力的数据支持。
items.titleZh: 先进骨科远程物理治疗模型：患者依从性、临床结局与满意度的回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究显示，一种先进的骨科远程物理治疗模型达到了 70.9% 的治疗完成率，超过全国基准（43%），且 96% 的完成者达到了最小临床重要差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Virtual physical therapy shows potential to surpass traditional models in orthopedic rehabilitation, particularly in adherence and functional improvement. This study highlights the feasibility and efficiency of virtual PT models, providing strong data to support integrating virtual care into your daily practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，且缺乏对照组，无法排除混杂因素对结果的影响。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective cohort study lacks a control group, making it unable to rule out confounding factors influencing the results.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Preoperative physiotherapy and one-year patient-reported outcomes after primary total knee arthroplasty: a registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients.
items.summary: A registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients found that preoperative physiotherapy did not significantly improve patient-reported outcomes or pain at two months and one year after primary total knee arthroplasty, compared to no preoperative physiotherapy.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提供了重要的临床见解：术前物理治疗未能显著改善初次全膝关节置换术后一年的患者报告结局和疼痛。在考虑常规推荐术前 PT 时，请审慎评估其额外价值，并更多关注术后康复方案的优化。
items.titleZh: 术前物理治疗与初次全膝关节置换术后一年患者报告结局：一项基于注册数据的 1,688 名患者队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项基于注册数据的 1,688 名患者队列研究发现，术前物理治疗并未显著改善初次全膝关节置换术后两个月和一年时的患者报告结局或疼痛，与未接受术前物理治疗的患者相比。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study offers critical clinical insight: preoperative physical therapy did not significantly improve patient-reported outcomes or pain one year after primary total knee arthroplasty. When considering routine recommendations for preoperative PT, carefully evaluate its added value and focus more on optimizing postoperative rehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性队列研究，尽管进行了多变量调整，仍无法完全排除未测量的混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational cohort study; despite multivariate adjustments, unmeasured confounding factors cannot be completely ruled out.

items.title: Short-term effects of therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy in myofascial pain syndrome: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=60) found that therapeutic massage, alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy, effectively improved pain, pressure pain threshold, muscle activity, functional disability, and quality of life in individuals with chronic upper trapezius myofascial pain syndrome in the short term.
items.curatedReason: 针对肌筋膜疼痛综合征，治疗性按摩无论是单独使用还是结合传统物理治疗，在短期内都显示出对疼痛和功能障碍的改善。这提示你，治疗性按摩可以是肌筋膜疼痛综合征管理中有效的辅助手段，但仍需更长期随访数据支持其持续疗效。
items.titleZh: 治疗性按摩单独或联合传统物理治疗对肌筋膜疼痛综合征的短期效应：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=60）发现，治疗性按摩无论是单独使用还是结合传统物理治疗，在短期内均有效改善了慢性斜方肌上部肌筋膜疼痛综合征患者的疼痛、压痛阈值、肌肉活动、功能障碍和生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: For myofascial pain syndrome, therapeutic massage, whether alone or combined with conventional physical therapy, showed short-term improvements in pain and functional disability. This suggests that therapeutic massage can be an effective adjunct in managing myofascial pain syndrome, but long-term follow-up data is still needed to support its sustained efficacy.
items.limitation: 研究仅关注短期效应，无法评估长期疗效；样本量相对较小（60 名参与者）。
items.limitationEn: The study focused only on short-term effects, making it unable to assess long-term efficacy; the sample size was relatively small (60 participants).

items.title: The WalkBack (walking and education) program for prevention of low back pain is acceptable to physiotherapists but relies on training, flexibility and system-level enablers to optimise implementation: a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study among 20 Australian physiotherapists found that the WalkBack program for low back pain prevention is acceptable but requires training, flexibility, and system-level enablers to optimize implementation in routine practice.
items.curatedReason: WalkBack 项目为预防性腰痛干预提供了一个可行的框架，但其在临床实践中的采纳需要更多系统层面的支持和灵活性。你可以思考如何将类似的预防项目整合到日常工作中，并向上级提出所需的支持，以更好地服务有复发风险的患者。
items.titleZh: WalkBack（步行与教育）项目预防腰痛对物理治疗师来说是可接受的，但其优化实施依赖于培训、灵活性和系统层面的支持：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 20 名澳大利亚物理治疗师的定性研究发现，WalkBack 腰痛预防项目虽然可接受，但其在常规实践中的优化实施依赖于培训、灵活性和系统层面的支持。
items.curatedReasonEn: The WalkBack program offers a viable framework for preventive low back pain intervention, but its adoption in clinical practice requires more system-level support and flexibility. You can consider how to integrate similar preventive programs into your daily work and advocate for the necessary support from management to better serve patients at risk of recurrence.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，其结果不能代表所有物理治疗师的观点，也无法量化采纳障碍和促进因素。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study's findings do not represent all physiotherapists' views and cannot quantify barriers and facilitators to adoption.

items.title: Predictive socio-cultural factors of pain intensity, disability, and quality of life in patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain: a prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study (n=1350) in Dutch primary care physiotherapy patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain found socio-cultural factors, such as education level and migration background, predicted pain intensity, disability, and quality of life outcomes at 3, 6, and 12 months.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了社会文化因素在非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量中的预测作用。它提醒你，在评估和治疗 NSMSP 患者时，不能只关注生物医学因素，还需要将患者的教育水平、移民背景等社会文化因素纳入考量，以提供更全面的康复方案。
items.titleZh: 非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量的社会文化预测因素：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 1350 名荷兰初级物理治疗机构非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的前瞻性队列研究发现，社会文化因素（如教育水平和移民背景）可预测患者在 3、6 和 12 个月时的疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals the predictive role of socio-cultural factors in pain intensity, disability, and quality of life for patients with non-specific musculoskeletal pain. It reminds you that when assessing and treating NSMSP patients, you should not only focus on biomedical factors but also consider socio-cultural factors such as education level and migration background, to provide a more comprehensive rehabilitation plan.
items.limitation: 研究基于荷兰初级保健物理治疗患者，结果的外推性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: The study was based on patients receiving primary care physiotherapy in the Netherlands, which may limit the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: A study found that individuals after ACL reconstruction exhibited lower triceps surae electromyographic (EMG) activity during single-leg jumping tasks compared to healthy controls, with no significant bilateral differences within the ACLR group.
items.curatedReason: ACL 重建术后患者在单腿跳跃任务中腓肠肌肌电活动可能降低。这提示你在 ACLR 术后康复中，应特别关注腓肠肌的神经肌肉控制训练，因为它可能在 ACL 损伤和再损伤的风险因素中被低估。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后个体单腿跳跃任务中腓肠肌神经肌肉活动
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，前交叉韧带重建术后个体在单腿跳跃任务中，腓肠肌的肌电活动低于健康对照组，且 ACLR 组内部未观察到显著的双侧差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patients after ACL reconstruction may exhibit reduced triceps surae EMG activity during single-leg jumping tasks. This suggests that in ACLR rehabilitation, you should pay particular attention to neuromuscular control training for the triceps surae, as it might be an underestimated factor in ACL injury and re-injury risk.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小，且为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size and a cross-sectional design, preventing the establishment of causality.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Eight weeks of visual perturbation training effects on unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and errors in male athletes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a randomized controlled clinical trial (RCT).
items.summary: An RCT (n=24 male athletes) found eight weeks of visual perturbation training improved unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and reduced errors in male athletes after ACL reconstruction, suggesting benefits for restoring subtle neuromuscular deficits.
items.curatedReason: 针对 ACLR 术后重返运动的男性运动员，为期八周的视觉扰动训练能有效改善其非预期性切入动作的下肢生物力学并减少错误。这表明在 ACL 康复中，除了传统的肌肉强化和本体感觉训练，你还应考虑加入认知负荷下的动态任务，以更好地模拟运动实况，降低再损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 八周视觉扰动训练对前交叉韧带重建术后男性运动员非预期性切入下肢生物力学和错误的影响：一项随机对照临床试验（RCT）
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（24 名男性运动员）发现，为期八周的视觉扰动训练改善了前交叉韧带重建术后男性运动员非预期性切入时的下肢生物力学并减少了错误，提示其对恢复细微神经肌肉缺陷有益。
items.curatedReasonEn: For male athletes returning to sport after ACLR, eight weeks of visual perturbation training effectively improves lower-limb biomechanics and reduces errors during unanticipated cutting maneuvers. This suggests that in ACL rehabilitation, beyond traditional muscle strengthening and proprioceptive training, you should consider incorporating dynamic tasks under cognitive load to better simulate real-sport conditions and reduce re-injury risk.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于男性运动员，结果对外推到女性或其他人群时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study was limited to male athletes, so caution is needed when generalizing the results to females or other populations.

items.title: Mindset, Effort, and Support-the foundation for patients' decision to return to sport after an anterior cruciate ligament injury. A qualitative analysis from the NACOX Cohort.
items.summary: A qualitative analysis of 112 ACL-injured patients found that mindset, effort, and support were foundational to their decision to return to sport, highlighting motivation, treatment/recovery, and medical clearance/readiness as key determinants.
items.curatedReason: ACL 损伤患者重返运动的决策受心态、努力和支持这三个核心因素影响。这意味着你在帮助患者做重返运动决策时，不仅要评估其生理恢复情况，更要深入了解他们的心理准备、投入程度以及来自医疗团队和环境的支持，提供更个性化的指导。
items.titleZh: 心态、努力与支持——前交叉韧带损伤患者重返运动决策的基础。NACOX 队列的定性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对 112 名 ACL 损伤患者的定性分析发现，心态、努力和支持是他们重返运动决策的基础，其中动机、治疗与康复、医学许可与准备是关键决定因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: ACL injury patients' return-to-sport decisions are influenced by three core factors: mindset, effort, and support. This means that when helping patients make return-to-sport decisions, you should not only assess their physiological recovery but also delve into their psychological readiness, commitment, and the support from their medical team and environment, providing more personalized guidance.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性分析，数据来自患者的自由文本回答，可能存在主观性和信息不完整性。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative analysis relies on patients' free-text responses, which may introduce subjectivity and incomplete information.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey of physical therapists treating pediatric and adolescent ACL injury patients aimed to describe factors influencing clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in this population.
items.curatedReason: 本调查提示，儿科和青少年 ACL 损伤患者的 BFRT 临床决策受多种因素影响。如果你在考虑使用 BFRT，需留意目前该领域临床实践的现状、现有挑战以及研究与实践间的可能差距。
items.titleZh: 影响前交叉韧带损伤后儿童和青少年患者血流限制训练临床决策的因素
items.summaryZh: 一项针对治疗儿童和青少年 ACL 损伤患者的物理治疗师的横断面调查，旨在描述影响该人群血流限制训练（BFRT）临床决策的因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey suggests that clinical decision-making for BFRT in pediatric and adolescent ACL injury patients is influenced by multiple factors. If you are considering BFRT, be mindful of the current state of clinical practice, existing challenges, and potential gaps between research and practice in this population.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，依赖于物理治疗师的自我报告，可能存在回忆偏倚和报告偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey relies on physical therapists' self-reports, which may be subject to recall and reporting bias.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: The Perspective and Needs of Older Adults With Osteoporosis With a Recent Upper Extremity Fragility Fracture Concerning Fall Risk and Fear of Falling.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the perspectives of older adults with osteoporosis and upper extremity fragility fractures, highlighting their health concerns, the impact of falls and fear of falling (FoF), and views on rehabilitation, emphasizing FoF as a psychological challenge often overlooked.
items.curatedReason: 老年骨质疏松患者上肢脆性骨折后，跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧是普遍存在的心理和社会挑战，且常被忽视。这项定性研究提醒你，在制定这些患者的康复计划时，必须深入了解其跌倒恐惧，并将其纳入干预策略，以提升康复依从性和效果。
items.titleZh: 上肢脆性骨折老年骨质疏松患者对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的观点和需求
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了上肢脆性骨折老年骨质疏松患者的观点，突出了他们对健康、跌倒及跌倒恐惧（FoF）的影响，以及对康复的看法，强调 FoF 是一个常被忽视的心理挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: Fall risk and fear of falling are prevalent and often overlooked psychological and social challenges in older adults with osteoporosis after upper extremity fragility fractures. This qualitative study reminds you that when developing rehabilitation plans for these patients, it is crucial to thoroughly understand and incorporate their fear of falling into intervention strategies to improve rehabilitation adherence and outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，其发现的观点和需求可能无法代表所有老年骨质疏松患者。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study's findings regarding perspectives and needs may not represent all older adults with osteoporosis.

items.title: Effects of Dynamic Taping on Dynamic Balance and Proprioception in Recreational Athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability.
items.summary: A single-blind RCT (n=28) found dynamic taping and sports taping had similar immediate effects on dynamic balance and proprioception in recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability, suggesting dynamic taping as a viable alternative.
items.curatedReason: 动态贴扎（DT）和运动贴扎（ST）在改善慢性踝关节不稳（CAI）患者的动态平衡和本体感觉方面具有相似的即时效果。这表明 DT 是 ST 的有效替代方案，特别是在需要保持功能性活动而又不限制运动的场景。你可以根据患者需求和贴扎目标选择合适的贴扎技术。
items.titleZh: 动态贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳休闲运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项单盲随机对照试验（n=28）发现，动态贴扎和运动贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳的休闲运动员在动态平衡和本体感觉方面具有相似的即时效果，表明动态贴扎是一个可行的替代方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: Dynamic Taping (DT) and Sports Taping (ST) show similar immediate effects in improving dynamic balance and proprioception in patients with chronic ankle instability (CAI). This suggests DT is an effective alternative to ST, especially when maintaining functional motion without restricting movement is desired. You can choose the appropriate taping technique based on patient needs and taping goals.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（28 名参与者），且仅评估了短期即时效应。
items.limitationEn: The study involved a small sample size (28 participants) and only assessed immediate short-term effects.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Biomechanical effects of Kinesio versus Mulligan ankle taping on balance and ankle function in chronic STROKE: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=33) found Kinesio taping or Mulligan taping combined with treadmill training significantly improved ankle dorsiflexion range of motion, balance, and fall efficacy in chronic stroke patients over six weeks, compared to treadmill training alone.
items.curatedReason: 在慢性卒中患者中，Kinesio 贴扎或 Mulligan 贴扎结合跑台训练，在踝关节背屈 ROM、平衡和跌倒效能方面优于单独的跑台训练。这提示你，将贴扎技术整合到卒中患者的康复方案中，可能有助于提升其步态和平衡功能，降低跌倒风险。
items.titleZh: Kinesio 贴扎与 Mulligan 踝关节贴扎对慢性卒中患者平衡和踝关节功能的生物力学效应：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=33）发现，Kinesio 贴扎或 Mulligan 贴扎结合跑台训练，在六周内显著改善了慢性卒中患者的踝关节背屈活动度、平衡和跌倒效能，优于单独的跑台训练。
items.curatedReasonEn: In chronic stroke patients, Kinesio taping or Mulligan taping combined with treadmill training improved ankle dorsiflexion ROM, balance, and fall efficacy more than treadmill training alone. This suggests that integrating taping techniques into stroke rehabilitation protocols may help enhance gait and balance function, reducing fall risk.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（每组 11 人），且干预周期为 6 周，尚不能评估长期效果。
items.limitationEn: The study had a small sample size (11 participants per group) and a 6-week intervention period, making it unable to assess long-term effects.

items.title: Validity and reliability of on‑site and off‑site direct observation of procedural skills (DOPS) for knee mobilization in Physical therapy education.
items.summary: A study validated the Direct Observation of Procedural Skills (DOPSknee) tool for knee joint mobilization, showing good inter-rater reliability for both on-site and off-site assessments among 42 physical therapy students.
items.curatedReason: 这份研究验证了 DOPSknee 工具在膝关节松动术教学中的有效性与可靠性，无论是在现场还是远程评估，都能提供即时反馈。如果你负责 PT 教育或临床带教，可以考虑将此工具整合到你的培训和评估体系中。
items.titleZh: 现场与远程直接观察操作技能（DOPS）在物理治疗教育中膝关节松动术的效度与信度
items.summaryZh: 一项研究验证了膝关节松动术操作技能直接观察工具（DOPSknee）的效度与信度，显示该工具在 42 名物理治疗学生中，无论现场还是远程评估，均具有良好的评估者间信度。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study validates the DOPSknee tool for teaching knee joint mobilization, demonstrating its reliability and validity for immediate feedback in both on-site and off-site assessments. If you are involved in PT education or clinical supervision, consider integrating this tool into your training and evaluation system.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（42 名学生），可能影响结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: The study involved a relatively small sample size (42 students), which may affect the generalizability of the findings.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: TRAK MSK: a randomised external feasibility trial and process evaluation of a digital physiotherapy supported self-management programme for people with musculoskeletal pain.
items.summary: A two-arm multi-site randomized external feasibility trial of TRAK MSK, a digital physiotherapy-supported self-management program for musculoskeletal pain, explored the feasibility of conducting a definitive trial, randomizing participants to the program or usual NHS physiotherapy care over 16 weeks.
items.curatedReason: TRAK MSK 项目显示了数字物理治疗支持的自我管理对慢性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的潜力。这项可行性研究为未来大规模 RCT 铺平了道路，预示着数字健康解决方案在改善患者功能和生活质量方面的作用日益增强。你可以留意后续的决定性试验结果。
items.titleZh: TRAK MSK：一项针对肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的数字物理治疗支持自我管理计划的随机外部可行性试验与过程评估
items.summaryZh: 一项针对肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的数字物理治疗支持自我管理计划（TRAK MSK）的两臂多中心随机外部可行性试验，评估了开展决定性试验的可行性，参与者被随机分配到 TRAK MSK 干预组或常规 NHS 物理治疗护理组，为期 16 周。
items.curatedReasonEn: The TRAK MSK program demonstrates the potential of digitally supported self-management for individuals with chronic musculoskeletal pain. This feasibility study paves the way for future large-scale RCTs, indicating a growing role for digital health solutions in improving patient function and quality of life. Keep an eye out for the results of the definitive trial.
items.limitation: 这是一项可行性研究，其结果不能直接推断为干预措施的最终疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is a feasibility study, and its results cannot be directly extrapolated to the definitive efficacy of the intervention.

items.title: Major discrepancies in recommendations regarding long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement: a survey among Swedish physiotherapists.
items.summary: A survey among Swedish physiotherapists revealed major discrepancies in recommendations for long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement surgery due to limited evidence, potentially impacting patient confidence and rehabilitation adherence.
items.curatedReason: 膝关节置换术后长期活动限制建议存在巨大差异，这表明该领域缺乏统一的循证指导。你在为患者提供指导时，需要认识到这种不确定性，并根据个体情况进行权衡，等待更明确的证据出炉。
items.titleZh: 膝关节置换术后长期活动限制建议存在重大分歧：瑞典物理治疗师调查
items.summaryZh: 一项针对瑞典物理治疗师的调查显示，由于缺乏证据，膝关节置换术后长期活动限制的建议存在重大差异，这可能影响患者信心和康复依从性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Significant discrepancies exist in recommendations for long-term activity restrictions after knee replacement, indicating a lack of uniform evidence-based guidance in this area. When advising patients, you should acknowledge this uncertainty and weigh recommendations based on individual circumstances, awaiting clearer evidence.
items.limitation: 本研究为问卷调查，可能存在回忆偏倚和报告偏倚，且仅限于瑞典物理治疗师的观点。
items.limitationEn: This survey study may be subject to recall and reporting bias, and is limited to the perspectives of Swedish physiotherapists.

items.title: Adapting the MSK-HQ for paediatric musculoskeletal care: Insights from a national survey and focus group of physiotherapists.
items.summary: A national survey and focus group with 55 UK pediatric clinicians (mostly physiotherapists) revealed positive views on adapting the Musculoskeletal Health Questionnaire (MSK-HQ) for use in pediatric musculoskeletal care for patients aged 8-18 years.
items.curatedReason: MSK-HQ 在儿科肌肉骨骼护理中的适应性得到了英国临床医生的认可，显示出其在该群体中作为有效结局测量工具的潜力。如果你在儿科 MSK 领域执业，可以关注其进一步的验证和标准化，以便未来将其整合到你的临床评估中。
items.titleZh: 针对儿科肌肉骨骼护理调整 MSK-HQ：来自全国物理治疗师调查和焦点小组的见解
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 55 名英国儿科临床医生（多数为物理治疗师）的全国调查和焦点小组显示，他们对将肌肉骨骼健康问卷（MSK-HQ）调整用于 8-18 岁儿科肌肉骨骼护理持积极看法。
items.curatedReasonEn: The adaptability of MSK-HQ in pediatric musculoskeletal care is recognized by UK clinicians, showing its potential as an effective outcome measure in this population. If you practice in pediatric MSK, you can monitor its further validation and standardization for potential integration into your clinical assessments.
items.limitation: 本研究为问卷调查和焦点小组形式，存在主观性和潜在的招募偏倚，不代表全国范围的意见。
items.limitationEn: This study, using surveys and focus groups, is subject to subjectivity and potential recruitment bias, and does not represent nationwide opinions.

items.title: Cognitive Rehabilitation Improves Functional Outcomes in Adults With Post-COVID Cognitive Impairment: Study
items.summary: A randomized clinical trial found that cognitive rehabilitation led to significantly greater and sustained improvements in functional goal attainment compared to usual care in adults with post-COVID cognitive impairment.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 确认认知康复能显著改善 COVID-19 后认知障碍患者的功能结局，并且效果持续。您可以将其作为这类患者的标准干预措施，并积极推荐。
items.titleZh: 研究发现认知康复可改善 COVID-19 后认知障碍成年患者的功能结局
items.summaryZh: 一项随机临床试验发现，与常规护理相比，认知康复能显著且持续改善 COVID-19 后认知障碍成年患者的功能目标达成。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT confirms that cognitive rehabilitation significantly improves functional outcomes in patients with post-COVID cognitive impairment, with sustained effects. You can integrate this as a standard intervention and actively recommend it for these patients.
items.limitation: 研究可能存在特定人群的纳入排除标准，外推时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study may have specific inclusion/exclusion criteria for its population; caution is needed when extrapolating.

items.title: Use and safety of corticosteroid injections in joints and musculoskeletal soft tissue: guidelines from the American Society of Regional Anesthesia and Pain Medicine, the American Academy of Pain Medicine, the American Society of Interventional Pain Physicians, and the International Pain and Spine Intervention Society
items.summary: This provides guidelines from multiple American societies on the use and safety of corticosteroid injections in joints and musculoskeletal soft tissue.
items.curatedReason: 这些来自多个主要学会的注射疗法指南为您提供了最新的循证实践框架，帮助您评估皮质类固醇注射在肌肉骨骼软组织和关节中的应用。注意其中的禁忌症和安全考量。
items.titleZh: 美国区域麻醉和疼痛医学学会、美国疼痛医学学会等关于关节和肌肉骨骼软组织皮质类固醇注射使用和安全性的指南
items.summaryZh: 这份指南来自多个美国学会，提供了关于关节和肌肉骨骼软组织中皮质类固醇注射的使用和安全性建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: These guidelines from major societies offer an up-to-date, evidence-based framework for corticosteroid injections in musculoskeletal soft tissue and joints. Pay attention to contraindications and safety considerations.

items.title: Prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injury: a systematic review and meta-analysis for the female, woman and girl Athlete Injury pRevention (FAIR) consensus
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis for the Female, Woman and Girl Athlete Injury pRevention (FAIR) consensus identified prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injury.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述和荟萃分析总结了女性运动员上肢损伤的预防策略和可修改风险因素。它为您在制定女性运动康复计划时提供了重要的循证依据。
items.titleZh: 女性、妇女和女孩运动员损伤预防（FAIR）共识：上肢损伤预防策略和可修改风险因素的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项针对女性、妇女和女孩运动员损伤预防（FAIR）共识的系统综述和荟萃分析确定了上肢损伤的预防策略和可修改风险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis summarizes prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injuries in female athletes. It provides crucial evidence for you when developing rehabilitation plans for female athletes.
items.limitation: 荟萃分析的异质性可能影响结果的综合解释。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity in meta-analysis may affect the overall interpretation of results.

items.title: Consensus statement on concussion in sport: the 6th International Conference on Concussion in Sport–Amsterdam, October 2022
items.summary: This consensus statement from the 6th International Conference on Concussion in Sport provides updated guidelines on concussion management.
items.curatedReason: 这份《运动中脑震荡共识声明》是基于第 6 届国际会议的最新成果。它为您在运动脑震荡的评估、管理和重返运动决策方面提供了权威指南。
items.titleZh: 运动中脑震荡共识声明：第 6 届国际运动中脑震荡会议——2022 年阿姆斯特丹
items.summaryZh: 这份来自第 6 届国际运动中脑震荡会议的共识声明，提供了关于运动中脑震荡管理的最新指南。
items.curatedReasonEn: This "Consensus Statement on Concussion in Sport" is based on the latest outcomes from the 6th International Conference. It provides authoritative guidance for you on concussion assessment, management, and return-to-sport decisions.
items.limitation: 共识声明虽然权威，但可能随着新证据出现而更新。
items.limitationEn: While authoritative, consensus statements may be updated as new evidence emerges.

items.title: A Multicenter Randomized Pragmatic Trial Comparing Intra-Articular Injection, Genicular Nerve Block, and Radiofrequency Ablation for Knee Osteoarthritis Pain: SKOAP Phase 2 Protocol
items.summary: This is a phase 2 protocol for a multicenter randomized pragmatic trial comparing intra-articular injection, genicular nerve block, and radiofrequency ablation for knee osteoarthritis pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入 75 分的 II 期临床方案直接比较了膝骨关节炎的三种常见介入疗法：关节内注射、膝关节神经阻滞和射频消融。它能帮助我们首次在真实世界中对比这些治疗的优劣，这对临床决策至关重要。
items.titleZh: 比较膝骨关节炎疼痛的关节内注射、膝神经阻滞和射频消融的多中心随机实用性试验：SKOAP 2 期方案
items.summaryZh: 这项 2 期方案描述了一项多中心随机实用性试验，旨在比较关节内注射、膝神经阻滞和射频消融对膝骨关节炎疼痛的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This phase 2 protocol (curated score 75) directly compares three common interventional treatments for knee osteoarthritis: intra-articular injection, genicular nerve block, and radiofrequency ablation. It offers the first real-world comparison of these therapies' effectiveness, which is crucial for clinical decision-making.
items.limitation: 本研究为协议，尚未发布最终结果。
items.limitationEn: This is a study protocol; final results are not yet published.

items.title: Hip Arthroscopic Labral Repair for Femoroacetabular Impingement Yields High Return-to-Sport Rates and Improved Outcomes in Basketball Players
items.summary: This study found high return-to-sport rates and improved outcomes in basketball players after hip arthroscopic labral repair for femoroacetabular impingement, with a minimum 2-year follow-up.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究显示，髋关节镜下盂唇修复对篮球运动员重返运动和改善结局有积极效果。您可以以此作为与患者讨论治疗方案和预期的参考。
items.titleZh: 髋关节镜下盂唇修复治疗股骨髋臼撞击综合征在篮球运动员中显示出高重返运动率和改善结局
items.summaryZh: 一项研究显示，髋关节镜下盂唇修复治疗股骨髋臼撞击综合征在篮球运动员中取得了高重返运动率和改善结局，至少随访 2 年。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study shows positive outcomes for basketball players returning to sport and improving outcomes after hip arthroscopic labral repair. You can use this as a reference when discussing treatment options and expectations with patients.
items.limitation: 回顾性研究，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: Retrospective study design, subject to selection bias.

items.title: Doha agreement meeting on terminology and definitions in groin ...
items.summary: The Doha agreement meeting established a consensus on terminology and definitions for groin pain in athletes.
items.curatedReason: 这份多哈共识声明统一了运动员腹股沟疼痛的术语和定义。遵循这些标准，能帮助您与不同专业的同行进行更清晰的沟通和诊断。
items.titleZh: 多哈运动员腹股沟疼痛术语和定义共识会议
items.summaryZh: 多哈协议会议就运动员腹股沟疼痛的术语和定义达成了共识。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Doha consensus statement standardizes terminology and definitions for groin pain in athletes. Adhering to these standards can help you communicate and diagnose more clearly with colleagues across different specialties.
items.limitation: 共识声明是专家意见，虽具权威性，但仍需结合最新研究进展进行更新。
items.limitationEn: A consensus statement is expert opinion; while authoritative, it still requires updates with new research developments.

items.title: Wound complications and clinical efficacy of the direct anterior approach versus the posterolateral approach in total hip arthroplasty: a systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis compared wound complications and clinical efficacy of direct anterior approach versus posterolateral approach in total hip arthroplasty.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述和荟萃分析比较了全髋关节置换术中两种常见手术入路，可为您在术后康复管理中评估患者风险提供参考。
items.titleZh: 全髋关节置换术中直接前路与后外侧入路对伤口并发症和临床疗效的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析比较了全髋关节置换术中直接前路与后外侧入路在伤口并发症和临床疗效方面的差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis comparing two common surgical approaches in total hip arthroplasty can inform your assessment of patient risks in post-operative rehabilitation management.
items.limitation: Meta-analysis 可能存在纳入研究异质性。
items.limitationEn: Potential heterogeneity among included studies in the meta-analysis.

items.title: BMJ Rapid Recommendations
items.summary: BMJ's Rapid Recommendations initiative aims to accelerate the integration of new research evidence into treatment guidelines, providing timely and transparent recommendations.
items.curatedReason: BMJ 的这项“快速推荐”机制，旨在加速新研究证据转化为临床指南。关注这个平台，您会更快地获取到那些可能改变您实践的循证建议。
items.titleZh: BMJ 快速推荐
items.summaryZh: BMJ 的“快速推荐”项目旨在加速新研究证据转化为治疗指南，提供及时、透明的推荐。
items.curatedReasonEn: BMJ's "Rapid Recommendations" initiative aims to accelerate the translation of new research into clinical guidelines. Monitor this platform for faster access to evidence-based advice that could impact your practice.

items.title: Study Finds Laparoscopic Sacrocolpopexy Improves Incontinence and Anterior Vaginal Defects
items.summary: A study found that laparoscopic sacrocolpopexy improves incontinence and anterior vaginal defects in women with pelvic organ prolapse and stress urinary incontinence.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提示腹腔镜骶骨阴道固定术（LSCP）能改善盆腔器官脱垂患者的尿失禁和阴道前壁缺陷。在管理这类患者时，这为您评估手术干预效果提供了参考。
items.titleZh: 研究发现腹腔镜骶骨阴道固定术可改善尿失禁和阴道前壁缺陷
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，腹腔镜骶骨阴道固定术能改善盆腔器官脱垂和压力性尿失禁女性的尿失禁和阴道前壁缺陷。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that laparoscopic sacrocolpopexy (LSCP) improves incontinence and anterior vaginal defects in patients with pelvic organ prolapse. This provides a reference for evaluating the effectiveness of surgical interventions when managing these patients.
items.limitation: 研究设计未明确，可能为观察性研究。
items.limitationEn: Study design not clearly specified, likely an observational study.

items.title: Patient-Controlled ESPB Offers Safe, Effective Alternative to Epidural Analgesia, finds study
items.summary: A new randomized trial suggests that patient-controlled lumbar erector spinae plane block (ESPB) offers a safe and effective alternative to patient-controlled epidural analgesia (PCEA) for pain after femur fracture surgery.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 提示患者自控竖脊肌平面阻滞（ESPB）可能是股骨骨折术后镇痛的有效替代方案，特别是当硬膜外镇痛不适用时。在术后疼痛管理中，您可以考虑这一选项。
items.titleZh: 研究发现患者自控竖脊肌平面阻滞是硬膜外镇痛的安全有效替代方案
items.summaryZh: 一项新的随机试验表明，患者自控腰部竖脊肌平面阻滞（ESPB）是股骨骨折术后镇痛中患者自控硬膜外镇痛（PCEA）的安全有效替代方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that patient-controlled erector spinae plane block (ESPB) may be an effective alternative for postoperative analgesia following femur fracture surgery, especially when epidural analgesia is not suitable. You might consider this option in postoperative pain management.
items.limitation: 虽然是 RCT，但需关注样本量和长期结局。
items.limitationEn: Although an RCT, sample size and long-term outcomes need to be considered.

items.title: Neurorobotics for Neurorehabilitation: Clinical Applications and Future Research Direction
items.summary: This article reviews the clinical applications and future research directions of neurorobotics in neurorehabilitation, covering medical exoskeletons and neuroprostheses.
items.curatedReason: 这份综述全面回顾了神经机器人在神经康复领域的应用。如果你正在关注外骨骼和神经假肢等技术，这篇综述能帮你了解最新的临床进展和未来研究方向。
items.titleZh: 神经康复中的神经机器人技术：临床应用和未来研究方向
items.summaryZh: 本文综述了神经机器人技术在神经康复中的临床应用和未来研究方向，包括医用外骨骼和神经假肢。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review offers a comprehensive overview of neurorobotics in neurorehabilitation. If you are tracking technologies like medical exoskeletons and neuroprostheses, this review provides insight into the latest clinical advancements and future research directions.
items.limitation: 综述文章，可能侧重于现有技术，缺乏对新方法或未成熟技术的深入探讨。
items.limitationEn: Review articles may focus on existing technologies, lacking in-depth discussion of new or nascent methods.

items.title: Ethical Considerations Toward Harmonizing Human and Machine Agency in Embodied Neurotechnologies
items.summary: This research discusses ethical considerations for harmonizing human and machine agency in embodied neurotechnologies like medical exoskeletons and neuroprostheses, which enhance functional agency for neurological patients.
items.curatedReason: 在使用外骨骼和神经假肢这类具身神经技术时，理解人机协同的伦理边界至关重要。本文从伦理层面剖析了这些技术在增强患者功能自主性时的考量，是你思考康复技术伦理不可或缺的参考。
items.titleZh: 具身神经技术中人机协同的伦理考量
items.summaryZh: 这项研究讨论了医用外骨骼和神经假肢等具身神经技术中人机协同的伦理考量，这些技术能增强神经系统疾病患者的功能能动性。
items.curatedReasonEn: When employing embodied neurotechnologies like medical exoskeletons and neuroprostheses, understanding the ethical boundaries of human-machine agency is crucial. This article provides an ethical analysis of these technologies in enhancing patient functional autonomy, serving as an indispensable reference for considering rehabilitation technology ethics.
items.limitation: 伦理探讨可能包含较多概念性内容，具体实践指南较少。
items.limitationEn: Ethical discussions may contain more conceptual content with fewer specific practical guidelines.

items.title: Single leg vertical jump performance identifies knee function deficits ...
items.summary: This research indicates that single-leg vertical jump performance effectively identifies knee function deficits at return to sport after ACL reconstruction in male athletes.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明单腿垂直跳跃表现可识别 ACL 重建术后男性运动员重返运动时的膝关节功能缺陷。将其纳入您的评估工具箱，以更精准地指导重返运动决策。
items.titleZh: 单腿垂直跳跃表现可识别 ACL 重建术后男性运动员重返运动时的膝关节功能缺陷
items.summaryZh: 这项研究表明，单腿垂直跳跃表现能有效识别 ACL 重建术后男性运动员重返运动时的膝关节功能缺陷。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that single-leg vertical jump performance can identify knee function deficits in male athletes returning to sport after ACL reconstruction. Incorporate this into your assessment toolkit for more precise guidance on return-to-sport decisions.
items.limitation: 研究对象为男性运动员，结果对外推至女性或其他人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study focused on male athletes; extrapolation to females or other populations should be done with caution.

items.title: Progressing rehabilitation after injury: consider the 'control-chaos ...
items.summary: This article proposes considering the 'control-chaos continuum' when progressing rehabilitation after injury, balancing early reintegration with reinjury risk.
items.curatedReason: “控制-混沌连续体”模型为损伤后的康复进展提供了新视角。这个概念框架可以帮助您在运动员重返运动训练中更好地平衡风险与负荷。
items.titleZh: 损伤后康复进展：考虑“控制-混沌连续体”
items.summaryZh: 本文提出在损伤后康复进展中应考虑“控制-混沌连续体”，以平衡早期重返训练与再损伤风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: The 'control-chaos continuum' model offers a new perspective on rehabilitation progression after injury. This conceptual framework can help you better balance risk and load in athlete return-to-sport training.
items.limitation: 该文章为述评，提出概念框架，但缺乏实证数据支持。
items.limitationEn: This article is a commentary proposing a conceptual framework, but lacks empirical data support.

items.title: All-endoscopic autologous suspension fixation achieves satisfactory outcomes in chronic Achilles tendon ruptures: study
items.summary: A study found that all-endoscopic autologous suspension fixation achieves satisfactory outcomes in chronic Achilles tendon ruptures.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究显示，全内窥镜自体悬吊固定术在慢性跟腱断裂中取得了满意效果。在评估患者手术方案时，您可以将此作为一种潜在的选择。
items.titleZh: 研究：全内窥镜自体悬吊固定术在慢性跟腱断裂中取得满意效果
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，全内窥镜自体悬吊固定术在慢性跟腱断裂中取得了满意效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study shows that all-endoscopic autologous suspension fixation yields satisfactory outcomes in chronic Achilles tendon ruptures. You can consider this as a potential option when evaluating surgical plans for patients.
items.limitation: 新闻报道未提供详细研究设计和样本量，可能为观察性研究。
items.limitationEn: News report does not provide detailed study design or sample size; likely an observational study.

items.title: High Prevalence of Visual Defects in Children with Cerebral Palsy, Suggests Study
items.summary: A cross-sectional study revealed a 73.3% prevalence of visual defects closely correlated with severe neuroimaging changes in pediatric cerebral palsy patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项横断面研究强调了脑瘫儿童视力缺陷的高患病率，并与神经影像学改变密切相关。这提示您在评估脑瘫儿童时，应将视力筛查和早期干预纳入常规考量。
items.titleZh: 研究表明脑瘫儿童视力缺陷患病率高
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究显示，小儿脑瘫患者中视力缺陷的患病率高达 73.3%，且与严重的神经影像学改变密切相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study highlights the high prevalence of visual defects in children with cerebral palsy, closely correlating with neuroimaging changes. This suggests that you should include vision screening and early intervention as routine considerations when assessing children with cerebral palsy.
items.limitation: 横断面研究无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional study cannot establish causality.

items.title: This is a protocol for a patient-oriented, mixed-methods study to explore preferences, barriers, and facilitat…
items.summary: This is a protocol for a patient-oriented, mixed-methods study to explore preferences, barriers, and facilitators regarding virtual pelvic healthcare in individuals with gynecological cancers.
items.curatedReason: 这份研究方案关注妇科癌症患者对虚拟盆腔医疗服务的偏好和障碍。它可能揭示远程医疗在盆腔康复领域的潜在作用和挑战。
items.titleZh: 妇科癌症患者虚拟盆腔医疗服务的偏好、障碍和促进因素：一项以患者为导向的混合方法研究方案
items.summaryZh: 这项研究方案旨在于采用以患者为导向的混合方法，探讨妇科癌症患者对虚拟盆腔医疗服务的偏好、障碍和促进因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study protocol focuses on preferences and barriers to virtual pelvic healthcare for gynecological cancer patients. It may reveal the potential role and challenges of telehealth in pelvic rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究为协议，尚未发布最终结果。
items.limitationEn: This is a study protocol; final results are not yet published.

items.title: Tongfu-Xingshen Capsule ameliorates ischemic stroke by inhibiting pyroptosis-mediated neuroinflammation
items.summary: This study found that Tongfu-Xingshen Capsule ameliorates ischemic stroke by inhibiting pyroptosis-mediated neuroinflammation in a rat model.
items.curatedReason: 通腑醒神胶囊在动物模型中显示出通过抑制细胞焦亡介导的神经炎症来改善缺血性卒中的潜力。记住，这只是动物研究，其临床转化路径漫长，目前尚不能指导人类卒中康复。
items.titleZh: 通腑醒神胶囊通过抑制焦亡介导的神经炎症改善缺血性卒中
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，通腑醒神胶囊通过抑制焦亡介导的神经炎症，在大鼠模型中改善了缺血性卒中。
items.curatedReasonEn: Tongfu-Xingshen Capsule shows potential in an animal model to ameliorate ischemic stroke by inhibiting pyroptosis-mediated neuroinflammation. As this is an animal study, its clinical translation pathway is long, and it currently cannot guide human stroke rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 动物模型研究结果不直接适用于人体，仍需临床验证。
items.limitationEn: Animal model results are not directly applicable to humans and require clinical validation.

items.title: Efficacy of remote ischemic conditioning on cerebral blood flow regulation in patients with endovascular stenting: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial investigated the efficacy of remote ischemic conditioning on cerebral blood flow regulation in patients with endovascular stenting.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT（curated score 70）提示远程缺血预处理可能改善血管内支架植入患者的脑血流调节。虽然有前景，但要将其作为神经保护的常规手段，还需要更多研究验证其确切机制和临床效益。
items.titleZh: 远程缺血预处理对血管内支架植入患者脑血流调节的疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验研究了远程缺血预处理对血管内支架植入患者脑血流调节的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT (curated score 70) suggests remote ischemic conditioning might improve cerebral blood flow regulation in patients with endovascular stenting. While promising, further research is needed to validate its precise mechanisms and clinical benefits before it can become a routine neuroprotective measure.
items.limitation: 研究结果的临床意义和长期效益仍需进一步评估。
items.limitationEn: Clinical significance and long-term benefits of the findings require further evaluation.

items.title: Serum Biomarkers in Paediatric Neurosurgery: Traumatic Brain Injury and Beyond
items.summary: This chapter reviews serum biomarkers in pediatric neurosurgery, focusing on traumatic brain injury and other neurological conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这篇关于儿科神经外科血清生物标志物的综述，虽然主要关注创伤性脑损伤，但可能为您在儿童神经损伤的评估和预后方面提供新思路。
items.titleZh: 儿科神经外科中的血清生物标志物：创伤性脑损伤及其他
items.summaryZh: 本章综述了儿科神经外科中的血清生物标志物，重点关注创伤性脑损伤及其他神经系统疾病。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review on serum biomarkers in pediatric neurosurgery, though focused on traumatic brain injury, may offer new insights into the assessment and prognosis of neurological injuries in children.
items.limitation: 综述文章，总结现有证据，不提供新数据。
items.limitationEn: Review article, summarizes existing evidence, does not provide new data.

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study in Cameroon (N=94 children aged 3-60 months) found that only 38.3% of children with cerebral palsy accessed physiotherapy early (before 5 months) and 38.3% showed good adherence (≥50% of sessions completed).
items.curatedReason: 这项喀麦隆的观察研究显示，当地仅有 38.3% 的脑瘫患儿能在 5 个月前开始物理治疗，且依从性良好的也仅有 38.3%。这提示我们，在资源有限的地区，早期干预和依从性仍是巨大挑战；你需要思考你的患者群体是否也面临类似的可及性障碍。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期物理治疗可及性与依从性：一项基于医院的研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在喀麦隆进行的横断面研究（N=94，3-60月龄脑瘫患儿）显示，仅38.3%的患儿能早期（5月龄前）获得物理治疗，且只有38.3%的患儿有良好依从性（完成≥50%的治疗计划）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study from Cameroon reveals that only 38.3% of children with cerebral palsy accessed physiotherapy before 5 months, and only 38.3% showed good adherence. This suggests early intervention and adherence remain significant challenges in resource-constrained settings; consider if your patient population faces similar accessibility barriers.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面观察性设计，难以确立因果关系，且数据主要来自单一中心和照护者访谈，可能存在回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional observational study cannot establish causality and relies heavily on data from a single center and caregiver interviews, which may introduce recall bias.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: The use of focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth physiotherapy: An observational study.
items.summary: An exploratory observational study examined how pediatric physiotherapists (N=6) used focus of attention for instructions and feedback during telehealth sessions for children with neurodevelopmental disorders (N=12), providing direct insights into practical application.
items.curatedReason: 这项探索性研究首次直接观察远程儿科物理治疗中“注意力焦点”的使用，填补了自我报告数据中的空白。它能让你更清晰地认识到远程治疗中语言指令在运动学习中的实际应用方式。
items.titleZh: 远程物理治疗中指令与反馈的注意力焦点应用：一项观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性观察研究考察了儿科物理治疗师（N=6）在为神经发育障碍儿童（N=12）提供远程治疗时，如何使用注意力焦点进行指令和反馈，为实际应用提供了直接见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory study, for the first time, directly observed the use of "focus of attention" in telerehabilitation for pediatric physiotherapy, filling a gap in self-report data. It offers clearer insights into how verbal instructions are practically applied in motor learning during telerehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项小样本探索性观察研究（6位治疗师，12位客户），无法得出普遍性结论，且未评估不同注意力焦点策略对治疗结局的影响。
items.limitationEn: This is a small-sample exploratory observational study (6 therapists, 12 clients), which limits generalizability and did not evaluate the impact of different focus of attention strategies on treatment outcomes.

items.title: Validating an Activity Monitor for Acute Care Patients: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT).
items.summary: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT) activity monitor was validated in 10 healthy older adults and 46 hospitalized patients, demonstrating accuracy in measuring stride length, steps, stepping time, sedentary time, and activity time when compared to video truth data.
items.curatedReason: PREEMPT 活动监测器在住院患者和健康老年人中显示出良好准确性。如果你所在机构正考虑在急性期护理中量化患者活动，这款设备提供了客观、易用的新选择，值得评估其临床价值。
items.titleZh: 验证急性期患者活动监测器：PREEMPT 的效用
items.summaryZh: PREEMPT 活动监测器在10名健康老年人和46名住院患者中得到验证，与视频真实数据相比，在测量步长、步数、行走时间、久坐时间和活动时间方面均表现出准确性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The PREEMPT activity monitor shows good accuracy in hospitalized patients and healthy older adults. If your facility is considering quantifying patient activity in acute care, this device offers a new objective and user-friendly option worth evaluating for its clinical value.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（46例住院患者，10位健康老年人），且未评估长期使用情况或对临床结局的预测能力。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (46 hospitalized patients, 10 healthy older adults) and did not evaluate long-term use or its predictive capability for clinical outcomes.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life: a randomised trial.
items.summary: An assessor-blinded, pragmatic RCT (N=350 cancer survivors) found that an 8-week group exercise-based telerehabilitation program was safe but not superior to a single session of in-person assessment and advice for improving health-related quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 这项大型 RCT 明确指出，基于运动的癌症远程康复在改善生活质量方面并不优于单次面对面评估与建议。这意味着，不要过度承诺远程方案的增量效益，其价值可能更多在于可及性而非疗效的显著提升。
items.titleZh: 癌症远程运动康复安全但生活质量改善不优于单次物理治疗：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项评估者盲法、实用型随机对照试验（N=350名癌症幸存者）发现，为期8周的团体运动型远程康复项目安全，但在改善健康相关生活质量方面不优于单次面对面评估和建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This large RCT clearly states that exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is not superior to a single in-person assessment and advice for improving quality of life. This means you should not over-promise incremental benefits of telerehabilitation; its value may lie more in accessibility than significantly enhanced efficacy.
items.limitation: 研究的对照组干预强度较低（单次面对面评估和建议），可能未能充分反映标准物理治疗的全部效果，从而限制了对远程康复优越性的评估。
items.limitationEn: The control group intervention (single in-person assessment and advice) was of lower intensity, which might not fully reflect the total effect of standard physiotherapy, thus limiting the assessment of telerehabilitation's superiority.

items.title: Identifying Gaps in Rehabilitation Strategies for Chronic Stroke: A Systematic Review of Evidence in Patients With and Without Nerve Transfer.
items.summary: A systematic review identified gaps in rehabilitation strategies for chronic stroke, highlighting a lack of direct comparisons and detailed rehabilitation protocols between contralateral C7 nerve transfer and technology-assisted/high-dose rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述强调了慢性卒中上肢康复领域，尤其是在对侧 C7 神经移植和高剂量/技术辅助康复之间，康复方案缺乏直接比较和详细描述。这意味着目前临床实践中很多方案的疗效比较尚无高等级证据支持，为未来研究指明了方向。
items.titleZh: 识别慢性卒中康复策略的差距：一项针对有无神经移植患者证据的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述识别了慢性卒中康复策略中的差距，尤其指出对侧 C7 神经移植与技术辅助/高剂量康复之间在康复方案的直接比较和详细描述方面存在不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review highlights a lack of direct comparisons and detailed rehabilitation protocol descriptions in chronic stroke upper limb rehabilitation, especially between contralateral C7 nerve transfer and high-dose/technology-assisted rehabilitation. This implies that many current clinical practices lack high-level evidence for comparative efficacy, pointing to clear directions for future research.
items.limitation: 综述指出，现有研究缺乏对康复剂量、内容和交付模式的详细描述和直接比较，限制了综合评估和明确建议的能力。
items.limitationEn: The review points out that existing studies lack detailed descriptions and direct comparisons of rehabilitation dose, content, and delivery models, limiting its ability to provide comprehensive assessment and clear recommendations.

items.title: Prevalence, Patterns, Treatment Outcomes and Costs of Physiotherapy-Managed Musculoskeletal Disorders in Nigeria.
items.summary: A 10-year retrospective study of 1582 patients at a Nigerian University Teaching Hospital found that musculoskeletal disorders are common, with diverse patterns and associated costs. Treatment effectiveness for pain was calculated.
items.curatedReason: 这份尼日利亚的真实世界研究揭示了肌肉骨骼疾病在当地的患病率、治疗模式、效果及成本。尽管样本量大，但作为回顾性观察研究，其证据等级不足以指导临床干预决策，更多是提供背景信息。
items.titleZh: 尼日利亚物理治疗管理肌肉骨骼疾病的患病率、模式、治疗结果与成本
items.summaryZh: 一项对尼日利亚一所大学教学医院 1582 名肌肉骨骼疾病患者进行的长达 10 年回顾性研究发现，该类疾病患病率高，模式多样，并涉及可观的治疗成本和疼痛干预效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This real-world study from Nigeria provides insights into the prevalence, treatment patterns, effectiveness, and costs of musculoskeletal disorders locally. While the sample size is large, as a retrospective observational study, its evidence level is not sufficient to guide clinical intervention decisions but rather offers valuable background information.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性观察性设计，存在选择偏倚和混杂因素风险，且数据来源单一，限制了结论的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This study is a retrospective observational design, which carries risks of selection bias and confounding factors. The single data source also limits the generalizability of its conclusions.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Composite severity score for race-related incidents in cycling
items.summary: This paper proposes an incident-level severity framework for surveillance in cycling, moving beyond traditional injury incidence to provide insight into the relative severity of race-related events.
items.curatedReason: 该论文提出了一个针对自行车比赛中事故严重程度的复合评分框架。这个工具对于未来运动损伤监测、风险评估和预防策略的制定具有潜在价值，能帮助您更精细地评估比赛风险。
items.titleZh: 自行车比赛中种族相关事件的复合严重性评分
items.summaryZh: 本论文提出了一种针对自行车比赛中事件严重程度的监测框架，旨在超越传统的损伤发生率，提供对比赛相关事件相对严重性的深入洞察。
items.curatedReasonEn: This paper proposes a composite severity score framework for race-related incidents in cycling. This tool has potential value for future sports injury surveillance, risk assessment, and prevention strategy development, helping you to evaluate competition risks more precisely.

items.title: An mHealth intervention based on behavior change techniques to promote physical activity and nutrition in older patients with cancer: protocol for an N-of-1 trial
items.summary: This protocol describes an N-of-1 trial using an mHealth intervention with behavior change techniques to improve physical activity and nutritional behaviors in older patients with cancer, employing a single-subject ABA' design.
items.curatedReason: 这是一项 N-of-1 试验方案，目前尚无结果。如果后续证实 mHealth 行为干预有效，这能提示我们居家康复的老年癌症患者，可考虑用这种个性化、基于技术的方案来改善体力活动和营养状况。
items.titleZh: 基于行为改变技术促进老年癌症患者体力活动和营养的移动健康干预：一项 N-of-1 试验方案
items.summaryZh: 这项方案描述了一项 N-of-1 试验，旨在通过采用单受试者 ABA' 设计的移动健康干预和行为改变技术，改善老年癌症患者的体力活动和营养行为。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is an N-of-1 trial protocol, with no results yet. If subsequent findings confirm mHealth behavioral interventions are effective, it would suggest that older cancer patients in home-based rehabilitation could consider such personalized, technology-based approaches to improve physical activity and nutritional status.
items.limitation: N-of-1 试验虽能提供个体化证据，但其小样本量和单中心设计限制了结果的普适性，外推至更广泛人群需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: While N-of-1 trials provide individualized evidence, their small sample size and single-center design limit generalizability. Extrapolating to broader populations should be done with caution.

items.title: Incomplete Cognitive Assessment in Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation: Recovering Clinically Interpretable Relationships from Routine Neuropsychological Data.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 2654 post-acute stroke patients found that incomplete routine cognitive assessments can still yield clinically interpretable relationships among cognitive, clinical, and contextual variables.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，即使卒中后认知评估数据不完整，通过特定方法仍能提取出具有临床意义的关系，这对于数据不完善的临床环境有实用价值。但请记住，不完整数据下的结论仍需谨慎对待。
items.titleZh: 急性期后卒中康复中不完整认知评估：从常规神经心理学数据中恢复临床可解释关系
items.summaryZh: 一项对 2654 名急性期后卒中患者进行的回顾性队列研究发现，即使常规认知评估数据不完整，仍能从中恢复认知、临床和背景变量之间具有临床可解释的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that even with incomplete post-stroke cognitive assessment data, clinically interpretable relationships can be extracted using specific methods, offering practical value for settings with imperfect data. However, exercise caution with conclusions drawn from incomplete datasets.
items.limitation: 研究依赖回顾性数据，可能存在记录偏倚和未记录的混杂因素，且结果的解释性仍需临床验证。
items.limitationEn: The study relies on retrospective data, which may involve recording bias and unrecorded confounding factors, and the interpretability of the results requires further clinical validation.

items.title: Towards safer and smarter boxing: technology, health and performance
items.summary: This article discusses the need for boxing to adopt technology and data-driven approaches to improve athlete health and performance, particularly in managing the inevitable head impacts and moving beyond intuition-based practices.
items.curatedReason: 这篇评论文章强调了拳击运动在科技、健康和表现方面需要改进，特别是如何更好地管理脑部冲击。它指出了从直觉转向数据驱动决策的必要性，这在任何高强度运动康复中都有借鉴意义。
items.titleZh: 迈向更安全、更智能的拳击：科技、健康与表现
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了拳击运动需要采纳技术和数据驱动方法以提升运动员健康和表现，特别是在管理不可避免的头部冲击方面，并摆脱基于直觉的实践。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary highlights the need for improvements in boxing regarding technology, health, and performance, particularly in better managing head impacts. It points out the necessity of shifting from intuition to data-driven decisions, which has implications for rehabilitation in any high-intensity sport.

items.title: Do blood flow restriction exercises offer additional benefits when compared to conventional exercises in musculoskeletal rehabilitation? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis found that low-load exercise with blood flow restriction (LLE-BFR) offers additional benefits over conventional low-load exercise (LLE) and is comparable to high-load exercise (HLE) in improving muscle strength, disability, and pain in individuals with musculoskeletal conditions.
items.curatedReason: 遇到肌骨患者的肌力、残疾或疼痛问题，别再局限于传统低负荷训练了。这项高质量系统综述提示，低负荷血流限制训练（LLE-BFR）效果优于传统低负荷训练，且能达到高负荷训练的效果，尤其适用于无法承受高负荷的患者。
items.titleZh: 与常规肌骨康复训练相比，血流限制训练是否提供额外益处？一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析发现，在肌骨疾病患者中，低负荷血流限制训练（LLE-BFR）在改善肌肉力量、残疾和疼痛方面优于传统低负荷训练（LLE），且与高负荷训练（HLE）效果相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients with musculoskeletal conditions struggling with muscle strength, disability, or pain, reconsider conventional low-load exercise. This high-quality systematic review suggests LLE-BFR is superior to conventional low-load exercise and comparable to high-load exercise, especially beneficial for those unable to tolerate high loads.
items.limitation: 未明确报告纳入研究的异质性程度和整体证据质量分级。
items.limitationEn: The degree of heterogeneity among included studies and the overall GRADE evidence quality were not explicitly reported.

items.title: Frontline agreement in diagnosis and treatment for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. A prospective, randomized, controlled study.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial found good agreement in diagnosis, treatment, and discharge decisions between physiotherapists and resident physicians compared with senior physicians in the emergency department for musculoskeletal conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明，在急诊科（ED）环境中，高级物理治疗师与医生在肌骨功能障碍的诊断和治疗决策上具有良好的一致性。这意味着物理治疗师可以安全有效地承担 ED 初筛角色，能显著缓解 ED 压力，并在你未来的执业范围拓展中提供支持。
items.titleZh: 肌骨功能障碍诊断和治疗的一线共识：一项前瞻性随机对照研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验发现，在急诊科处理肌骨疾病时，物理治疗师与住院医师在诊断、治疗和出院决策方面与资深医师有良好的一致性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates good agreement between advanced physiotherapists and physicians on diagnosis and treatment decisions for musculoskeletal dysfunctions in the emergency department (ED). This suggests that physiotherapists can safely and effectively assume an ED triage role, significantly alleviating ED pressure, and supporting future scope of practice expansion.
items.limitation: 研究仅在一家医院的急诊科进行，结果的外推性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: The study was conducted in a single hospital ED, which may limit the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Figure-of-Eight Taping Combined with Rehabilitation for Multidirectional Shoulder Instability in a School-Age Female Karate Athlete: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report describes a 12-year-old female karate athlete with multidirectional shoulder instability (MDI) whose exercise therapy was effectively facilitated through figure-of-eight taping.
items.curatedReason: 本病例报告展示了八字形贴扎如何辅助一名年轻空手道运动员的多方向肩关节不稳康复训练。作为个案，它仅提供初步观察，请勿将其外推为常规治疗策略。
items.titleZh: 八字形贴扎联合康复治疗学龄期空手道女运动员多方向肩关节不稳：一病例报告
items.summaryZh: 一篇病例报告描述了一名 12 岁患有多方向肩关节不稳（MDI）的空手道女运动员，其运动疗法通过八字形贴扎得到了有效辅助。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report illustrates how figure-of-eight taping facilitated rehabilitation for a young karate athlete with multidirectional shoulder instability. As a case study, it offers preliminary observations but should not be generalized as a routine treatment strategy.
items.limitation: 本研究为单病例报告，外推性非常有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a single case report with very limited generalizability.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Quantifying Physical Activity Through Step Count Estimation Across Multiple Wearable Sensor Configurations: A Validation Study in Post-Stroke and Healthy Adults.
items.summary: A study with 18 post-stroke and 18 healthy adults found that custom peak-detection algorithms, especially with ankle or hip-worn ActiGraph accelerometers, provided superior accuracy for step count estimation compared to manufacturer's algorithms in post-stroke individuals, particularly at lower walking speeds.
items.curatedReason: 如果你需要通过可穿戴设备精确测量卒中患者的步数，考虑使用脚踝或臀部佩戴的 ActiGraph 加速度计，并使用自定义峰值检测算法。制造商的 ActiLife 算法在卒中人群中的准确性相对较低。
items.titleZh: 通过多种可穿戴传感器配置量化身体活动步数估计：一项卒中和健康成人验证研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 18 名卒中患者和 18 名健康成人的研究发现，与制造商算法相比，使用定制峰值检测算法（尤其是在脚踝或臀部佩戴 ActiGraph 加速度计）在卒中患者中，特别是在较低步行速度下，能提供更准确的步数估计。
items.curatedReasonEn: If you need to accurately measure step counts in post-stroke patients using wearable devices, consider ankle or hip-worn ActiGraph accelerometers with a custom peak-detection algorithm. The manufacturer's ActiLife algorithm shows relatively lower accuracy in this population.
items.limitation: 这项验证研究的样本量相对较小（18 名卒中患者和 18 名健康成人），且所有参与者都来自同一机构，可能影响结果的普适性。
items.limitationEn: This validation study has a relatively small sample size (18 post-stroke and 18 healthy adults), and all participants were from the same institution, which may affect the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summary: A core set of nine patient-reported outcomes (PROs) grouped into three domains (functioning, general well-being, and social participation) and corresponding valid PROMs has been developed for pediatric physical therapy through focus groups, interviews, a scoping review, and expert panel consensus.
items.curatedReason: 儿科物理治疗有了核心患者报告结局（PROs）及其测量工具（PROMs）的推荐。这意味着你在日常实践、研究和质量评估中，可以更有依据地选择标准化工具，从而更好地评估干预效果和患者体验，提升诊疗质量。
items.titleZh: 儿科物理治疗核心患者报告结局（测量）集的开发
items.summaryZh: 通过焦点小组、访谈、范围界定综述和专家小组共识，儿科物理治疗已开发出一套包含九个患者报告结局（PROs）的核心集，这些结局分为三个领域（功能、总体幸福感和社会参与），并包含相应的有效 PROMs。
items.curatedReasonEn: Recommended core patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs) are now available for pediatric physical therapy. This means you can select standardized tools with greater confidence for daily practice, research, and quality assessment, thereby better evaluating intervention effectiveness and patient experience, and improving care quality.
items.limitation: 核心结局集的开发过程中，患者和家长参与度有限，且专家小组和调查问卷主要集中在荷兰，可能导致结果在其他文化和医疗体系中的普适性受限。
items.limitationEn: Patient and parent involvement in the core outcome set development was limited, and the expert panel and survey were primarily focused in the Netherlands, potentially limiting the generalizability of results to other cultures and healthcare systems.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Follow up to the 2018 IOC consensus statement on paediatric ACL injuries: towards a broader vision of care
items.summary: This editorial provides a follow-up to the 2018 IOC consensus statement on pediatric ACL injuries, examining recent advances, current evidence, and persistent challenges in prevention, individualized management, surgical strategies, and long-term holistic care.
items.curatedReason: 2018 年 IOC 关于儿童 ACL 损伤的共识声明已发布后续更新，这代表了该领域的最新进展和挑战。在处理儿童 ACL 损伤时，你应参考最新的指南，拓宽你的护理视野，确保为患儿提供全面的、长期的康复策略。
items.titleZh: 2018 年 IOC 儿童 ACL 损伤共识声明的后续：迈向更广阔的护理愿景
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论是对 2018 年 IOC 儿童 ACL 损伤共识声明的后续，旨在审视预防、个体化管理、手术策略和长期整体护理方面的新进展、现有证据和持续挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: The 2018 IOC consensus statement on pediatric ACL injuries has a follow-up, representing the latest advances and challenges in the field. When managing pediatric ACL injuries, you should refer to the updated guidelines to broaden your care perspective and ensure comprehensive, long-term rehabilitation strategies for young patients.

items.title: Prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating in athletes: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of studies up to December 2024 estimated the pooled prevalence of disordered eating (DE) in athletes at 29% (95% CI: 0.25–0.33) and eating disorders (EDs) at 6% (95% CI: 0.04–0.08). Female athletes and those in aesthetic/endurance sports showed higher prevalence.
items.curatedReason: 运动员中紊乱性进食（DE）的总体患病率高达 29%，而临床诊断的进食障碍（EDs）为 6%。尤其是女性运动员和参与美学/耐力项目的运动员，其患病率更高。作为康复专业人士，你必须主动筛查高风险人群，并将营养咨询和心理支持整合到康复计划中。
items.titleZh: 运动员饮食失调和紊乱性进食的患病率：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项截至 2024 年 12 月的系统综述和荟萃分析估计，运动员中紊乱性进食（DE）的汇总患病率为 29%（95% CI: 0.25–0.33），饮食失调（EDs）为 6%（95% CI: 0.04–0.08）。女性运动员以及从事审美/耐力运动的运动员患病率更高。
items.curatedReasonEn: Disordered eating (DE) affects 29% of athletes, with clinically diagnosed eating disorders (EDs) at 6%. Female athletes and those in aesthetic/endurance sports exhibit higher prevalence. As rehabilitation professionals, you must actively screen high-risk populations and integrate nutritional counseling and psychological support into rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 虽然是系统综述和荟萃分析，但纳入的研究在评估方法、诊断标准和人群特征上存在异质性，可能影响总体患病率估计的精确性和可比性。
items.limitationEn: Although a systematic review and meta-analysis, the included studies exhibited heterogeneity in assessment methods, diagnostic criteria, and population characteristics, which may affect the precision and comparability of overall prevalence estimates.

items.title: Subtype-specific optimal cut-off values of the Berg Balance Scale for predicting independent walking in inpatient stroke rehabilitation: a multicentre cohort study.
items.summary: A multicentre retrospective cohort study of 565 stroke patients (316 ischemic, 249 hemorrhagic) found that admission Berg Balance Scale (BBS) scores independently predicted independent walking at discharge. Optimal cut-off values were derived: 13.5 for ischemic stroke (AUC=0.858) and 12.5 for hemorrhagic stroke (AUC=0.871).
items.curatedReason: Berg 平衡量表（BBS）在卒中住院康复初期就能有效预测出院时的独立步行能力，特别是针对不同卒中亚型（缺血性 vs. 出血性）有特异性截断值。在你评估患者预后时，结合这些亚型特异性数值能提高预测准确性。
items.titleZh: 住院卒中康复中 Berg 平衡量表预测独立步行的亚型特异性最佳截断值：一项多中心队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 565 名卒中患者（316 名缺血性，249 名出血性）的多中心回顾性队列研究发现，入院时的 Berg 平衡量表（BBS）得分可独立预测出院时的独立步行能力。研究得出了最佳截断值：缺血性卒中为 13.5 分（AUC=0.858），出血性卒中为 12.5 分（AUC=0.871）。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Berg Balance Scale (BBS) at admission for stroke inpatient rehabilitation effectively predicts independent walking ability at discharge, with subtype-specific cut-off values for ischemic vs. hemorrhagic stroke. When assessing patient prognosis, incorporating these subtype-specific values can improve predictive accuracy.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，尽管样本量较大，但由于数据收集的固有局限性，可能存在未测量的混杂因素。此外，研究在韩国进行，其结果在不同医疗系统和人群中的普适性需谨慎评估。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study. Despite a large sample size, unmeasured confounders may exist due to inherent data collection limitations. Additionally, the study was conducted in South Korea, and the generalizability of its findings to different healthcare systems and populations should be cautiously evaluated.

items.title: Mental health in tennis: a cross-organisational hybrid summit-Delphi consensus process
items.summary: A hybrid summit-Delphi consensus process involving 83 participants from various tennis governing bodies and the broader ecosystem generated recommendations for mental healthcare and wellness promotion among elite tennis athletes, including juniors.
items.curatedReason: 网球界多组织合作制定了精英运动员（含青少年）心理健康促进与护理建议。这提示我们在康复工作中，应将心理健康支持纳入网球运动员的整体管理，并强调跨学科合作的重要性。
items.titleZh: 网球界的心理健康：一项跨组织混合峰会-德尔菲共识流程
items.summaryZh: 一项由网球界各管理机构和生态系统 83 名参与者组成的混合峰会-德尔菲共识流程，为精英网球运动员（包括青少年）的心理健康护理和健康促进制定了建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: The tennis community's collaborative recommendations for elite athletes' (including juniors) mental healthcare and wellness promotion suggest integrating mental health support into the overall management of tennis players during rehabilitation, underscoring the importance of interdisciplinary collaboration.

items.title: Incidence of injury and illness at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games: post-pandemic trends and sport-specific risks
items.summary: A prospective cohort study at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games monitored 4450 athletes over 14 days, reporting 535 injuries (prevalence=10.9%) and an incidence of 8.6 injuries per 1000 athlete days. Taekwondo (27.3) and football 5-a-side (22.3) had the highest injury incidences.
items.curatedReason: 巴黎 2024 残奥会的数据显示，残疾运动员在 14 天内受伤总发生率为 10.9%，平均每千运动员日 8.6 次受伤。其中，跆拳道（27.3）和五人制足球（22.3）的受伤发生率最高。这提示我们，在为这些高风险项目的残疾运动员设计预防和康复方案时，必须重点关注其专项伤病模式。
items.titleZh: 2024 年巴黎残奥会伤病和疾病发生率：后疫情时代趋势与特定运动风险
items.summaryZh: 一项针对巴黎 2024 残奥会的预期队列研究在 14 天内监测了 4450 名运动员，报告了 535 例伤病（患病率为 10.9%），伤病发生率为每 1000 运动员日 8.6 例。其中跆拳道（27.3）和五人制足球（22.3）的伤病发生率最高。
items.curatedReasonEn: Data from the Paris 2024 Paralympics shows a 10.9% overall injury prevalence among para-athletes over 14 days, with an incidence of 8.6 injuries per 1000 athlete days. Taekwondo (27.3) and football 5-a-side (22.3) had the highest injury incidences.
