This suggests that prevention and rehabilitation programs for para-athletes in these high-risk sports must specifically target their sport-specific injury patterns.
items.limitation: 该研究是在残奥会期间进行的短时间（14 天）监测，可能无法捕捉到长期或慢性伤病，且数据依赖于医疗设施的记录和运动员的报告，可能存在漏报。
items.limitationEn: This study involved short-term (14-day) monitoring during the Paralympic Games, which may not capture long-term or chronic injuries. Data also relied on medical facility records and athlete reports, potentially leading to underreporting.

items.title: Effects of spatial and temporal pre-verbal prioritized instructions on spatiotemporal gait parameters in stroke patients: A within-subject repeated-measures study.
items.summary: A study with 27 stroke patients found that spatial prioritized instructions immediately improved step length (p=0.001) and walking speed (p=0.003), while temporal prioritization primarily enhanced rhythm (p<0.001), compared to no prioritization.
items.curatedReason: 空间优先指令能立即改善卒中患者的步长和步速，时间优先指令则主要改善节律。这提示你在步态训练中，针对性地调整口头指令的侧重点，可以更精准地靶向步态参数，提高训练效率。
items.titleZh: 卒中患者空间和时间优先口头指令对步态时空参数的影响：一项组内重复测量研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 27 名卒中患者的研究发现，空间优先指令立即改善了步长（p=0.001）和步行速度（p=0.003），而时间优先指令主要增强了节律（p<0.001），这些效果均优于无优先指令对照组。
items.curatedReasonEn: Spatial prioritization instructions immediately improve step length and velocity in stroke patients, while temporal prioritization mainly improves rhythm. This suggests that specifically adjusting the focus of verbal instructions during gait training can more precisely target gait parameters, enhancing training efficiency.
items.limitation: 这是一项小样本的组内重复测量研究，尽管有随机条件，但长期效果和在更大、更多样化人群中的普适性仍需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a small-sample within-subject repeated-measures study. While conditions were randomized, long-term effects and generalizability to larger, more diverse populations require further validation.

items.title: Feasibility of Integrating Music Therapy into Routine Speech-Language Rehabilitation for Post-Stroke Aphasia: A Real-World Outpatient Study.
items.summary: A quasi-experimental study found it feasible to integrate music therapy into conventional speech-language therapy for post-stroke aphasia in an outpatient setting, with preliminary results suggesting potential improvements in language performance (Western Aphasia Battery-Thai Adaptation scores increased by 6.7 points on average in the music therapy group vs. 3.2 in standard care).
items.curatedReason: 卒中后失语症患者在常规言语治疗中整合音乐疗法是可行的。虽然这是一项可行性研究，但它提示音乐疗法作为一种辅助手段，可能有助于改善语言表现，值得在临床路径中考虑。
items.titleZh: 将音乐疗法整合到卒中后失语症常规言语康复中的可行性：一项真实世界门诊研究
items.summaryZh: 一项准实验性研究发现，在门诊环境中将音乐疗法整合到卒中后失语症的常规言语治疗中是可行的，初步结果表明语言表现可能有所改善（音乐治疗组的西方失语症量表-泰语适应版得分平均增加 6.7 分，而标准护理组为 3.2 分）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Integrating music therapy into routine speech-language rehabilitation for post-stroke aphasia is feasible. Although this is a feasibility study, it suggests that music therapy, as an adjunctive method, may help improve language performance and is worth considering in clinical pathways.
items.limitation: 这是一项准实验性可行性研究，未随机分组，实验组可能因总治疗时间增加而受益，而非单一音乐疗法效应。且研究在单一门诊进行，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This was a quasi-experimental feasibility study without randomization, and the experimental group might have benefited from increased overall therapeutic contact time, not solely from music therapy. The study was also conducted in a single outpatient clinic, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Building the foundations: organisational leadership for athlete mental health
items.summary: This editorial highlights the critical need for organizational leadership in proactively addressing athlete mental health, moving beyond reactive responses to crises. It emphasizes that mental health is an integral component of overall well-being, often overlooked in high-performance sports environments.
items.curatedReason: 竞技体育中运动员心理健康的重要性日益凸显，这篇文章强调了组织领导层在主动促进运动员心理健康方面的作用。作为运动康复领域的PT，你不仅要关注运动员的身体康复，更要意识到其所处组织的文化和支持系统对心理健康的影响，并可尝试在此层面提供支持。
items.titleZh: 建立基础：运动员心理健康的组织领导力
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论强调，组织领导层在主动解决运动员心理健康问题方面至关重要，应超越被动的危机应对。它强调心理健康是整体幸福不可或缺的组成部分，但在高水平体育环境中常被忽视。
items.curatedReasonEn: The importance of athlete mental health in competitive sports is growing, and this article emphasizes the role of organizational leadership in proactively promoting it. As a PT in sports rehabilitation, you should not only focus on physical recovery but also recognize the impact of the organizational culture and support system on mental health, and consider providing support at this level.

items.title: Monitoring an athletes performance-state after they return to sport is a significant challenge in ACL injury research and applied practice
items.summary: This editorial highlights that monitoring an athlete's performance-state after returning to sport following ACL reconstruction is a significant challenge, as many athletes experience long-term neuromuscular and sport performance impairments despite passing return-to-sport criteria.
items.curatedReason: ACL 损伤后运动员重返赛场后的表现状态监测是一个持续的挑战。这篇社论提醒你，即使运动员通过了重返赛场标准，也需要对其神经肌肉功能和运动表现进行长期监测，因为他们仍可能面临继发性损伤和长期功能障碍的风险。
items.titleZh: ACL 损伤研究和实践中，监测运动员重返赛场后的表现状态是一个重大挑战
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论指出，在 ACL 重建术后运动员重返赛场后，监测其表现状态是一个重大挑战，因为尽管他们通过了重返赛场标准，许多运动员仍会经历长期的神经肌肉和运动表现障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Monitoring athletes' performance status after returning to sport following an ACL injury remains a challenge. This editorial reminds you that even if athletes meet return-to-sport criteria, long-term monitoring of their neuromuscular function and sport performance is necessary, as they may still be at risk for subsequent injuries and long-term impairments.

items.title: Factors associated with return-to-sport outcomes following pathogen-confirmed acute respiratory infections in athletes: AWARE X study
items.summary: A prospective cohort study of 114 athletes with confirmed acute respiratory infections found that median time to return-to-training (RTT) was 3.5 days, return-to-full-training (RTFT) was 8 days, and return-to-full-performance (RTFP) was 11 days. Illness severity (moderate/severe vs. mild) was associated with longer RTFP (HR=0.45).
items.curatedReason: 急性呼吸道感染后，运动员重返训练的中位时间为 3.5 天，完全恢复表现则需 11 天。疾病严重程度与完全恢复表现时间延长相关。指导运动员康复时，务必根据个体病情，特别是疾病严重程度，循序渐进地安排负荷，以防过早复训引发反复。
items.titleZh: 运动员病原体确诊急性呼吸道感染后重返运动结局相关因素：AWARE X 研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 114 名确诊急性呼吸道感染运动员的前瞻性队列研究发现，重返训练（RTT）的中位时间为 3.5 天，重返完全训练（RTFT）为 8 天，重返完全表现（RTFP）为 11 天。疾病严重程度（中度/重度 vs. 轻度）与更长的 RTFP 相关（HR=0.45）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Following acute respiratory infections, athletes return-to-training in a median of 3.5 days, but return-to-full-performance takes 11 days. Illness severity is linked to a longer return-to-full-performance. When guiding athlete rehabilitation, ensure a progressive load based on individual illness, especially severity, to prevent premature return-to-play issues.
items.limitation: 这是一项单中心前瞻性队列研究，且大部分运动员来自团体运动项目，这可能限制了结果对其他运动类型和不同人群的普适性。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center prospective cohort study, and most athletes were from team sports, which may limit the generalizability of results to other sports types and populations.

items.title: #Beyondthelikes: the influence of social media on athletes mental health
items.summary: This editorial explores the dual impact of social media on young athletes' mental health, highlighting both risks and opportunities, and suggesting future directions for research and practice in this rapidly evolving digital context.
items.curatedReason: 社交媒体对年轻运动员心理健康的影响是一个复杂且日益重要的话题。在康复过程中，除了关注身体机能，也需要意识到数字环境可能带来的心理风险和机遇，这有助于你更全面地理解和支持年轻运动员的康复过程。
items.titleZh: #超越点赞：社交媒体对运动员心理健康的影响
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论探讨了社交媒体对年轻运动员心理健康的双重影响，强调了其风险与机遇，并为这一快速发展的数字环境中的研究和实践提出了未来方向。
items.curatedReasonEn: The influence of social media on young athletes' mental health is a complex and increasingly important topic. During rehabilitation, besides focusing on physical function, it's crucial to be aware of the psychological risks and opportunities presented by the digital environment. This understanding will help you comprehensively support young athletes' recovery.

items.title: The Impact of Mandatory Bundled Payment on Prehabilitation Delivery for Lower Extremity Joint Replacement.
items.summary: A difference-in-differences analysis (n=62,217 Medicare beneficiaries) found that the Comprehensive Care for Joint Replacement (CJR) bundled payment model impacted the proportion of hospitals delivering prehabilitation for lower extremity joint replacement.
items.curatedReason: 强制捆绑支付（CJR）模式对美国 Medicare 受益人的下肢关节置换术前康复（prehabilitation）服务交付产生了影响。这项研究告诉你，在新的报销环境下，如何调整服务模式以确保患者能获得术前康复。
items.titleZh: 强制捆绑支付对下肢关节置换术前康复服务交付的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项双重差分分析（涉及62,217名 Medicare 受益人）发现，全面关节置换护理 (CJR) 捆绑支付模式影响了提供下肢关节置换术前康复服务的医院比例。
items.curatedReasonEn: The mandatory bundled payment (CJR) model has impacted prehabilitation delivery for lower extremity joint replacement among Medicare beneficiaries in the US. This study informs you on how to adapt service models in new reimbursement environments to ensure patients receive prehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究基于 Medicare 索赔数据，可能无法完全捕捉所有临床实践细节，且结果仅适用于美国 Medicare 系统。
items.limitationEn: The study is based on Medicare claims data, which may not fully capture all clinical practice details, and results are applicable only to the US Medicare system.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation
